benefits.description: BPC-157 temporarily resolved stomach pain and GI issues from prolonged ADHD medication use, stress, and NSAIDs
BPC-157 induced extreme hunger during first vial, allowing consistent nutritious meals
GHRP-6 induced intense hunger leading to consistent meal consumption, which sustained GI healing beyond BPC-157 effects
GHRP-6 caused intense hunger lasting throughout day after initial evening dose

side_effects.description: Extreme hunger with BPC-157 first vial only; appetite disappeared when stomach pain returned

protocol_notes: First BPC-157 vial resulted in temporary relief; second vial was ineffective. Theorized that hunger induction was the key mechanism of healing. GHRP-6 reconstituted with 2ml bacteriostatic water, dosed at 4-6 units (100-150mcg) on insulin syringe sublingual. Fasted 2-3 hours before dosing, waited 30-50 minutes before eating. No noticeable body fat gain despite increased eating over 4 weeks. BPC-157 also blunted stimulant effects. Notes that root cause was vascular insufficiency from chronic Vyvanse use, stress, poor diet, and NSAIDs creating vasoconstrictive state preventing healing.
